name: Florence Nightingale
quote: How very little can be done under the spirit of fear.

name: Charles Darwin
quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.

name: Marie Curie
quote: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood. Now is the time to understand more, so that we may fear less.

name: Eleanor Roosevelt
quote: Where, after all, do universal human rights begin? In small places, close to home — so close and so small that they cannot be seen on any map of the world.

name: Albert Einstein
quote: The release of atom power has changed everything except our way of thinking, and thus we drift toward unparalleled catastrophe.

name: Nelson Mandela
quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.

name: Malala Yousafzai
quote: One child, one teacher, one book, one pen can change the world. Education is the only solution.
